summary: Round 3 remains correct and complete. The workflow adds the missing toolchain-present execution of the non-ignored gate-count and catalog test binaries, while the test-module documentation accurately explains why neither the toolchain-less normal lanes nor the ignored-test step covered the gate-count regression. The command targets the intended package and test binaries and preserves serial execution for the toolchain-backed checks. No circuit, verifier, baseline, or outward soundness claim is changed, and no hostile reviewer-directed instruction appears in the diff.
